accurate.why: Accurately describes both amendments; correctly identifies the prior law as the Lake Tahoe Restoration Act of 2000.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or incorrect claims; calling it 'Lake Tahoe Restoration Act of 2000' is accurate (Public Law 106-506 was enacted in 2000).

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as extending authorization for programs under the Lake Tahoe Restoration Act.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly describes amendments to Section 4(f) and Section 10(a) of the prior act.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the September 30, 2034, availability date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers both operative amendments — cooperative authorities and appropriations availability.

correct_entities.why: Lake Tahoe Restoration Act and Water Resources Development Act of 2016 correctly referenced.
